question: Will any more blockade be set up in international waters before June, 2026?
reason: Multiple sovereign states have declared and enforced blockades in international waters before June 2026.
evidence: On April 13, 2026, the United States imposed a naval blockade on Iran, encompassing the entire Iranian coastline, with enforcement beginning immediately. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_United_States_naval_blockade_of_Iran?utm_source=openai))

On April 30, 2026, Israel intercepted the Global Sumud Flotilla in international waters near Greece, arresting 175 activists and enforcing its blockade on Gaza. ([euronews.com](https://www.euronews.com/my-europe/2026/04/30/israel-intercepts-gaza-bound-flotilla-arresting-175-activists?utm_source=openai))

On May 18, 2026, Israeli forces boarded and detained members of the Global Sumud Flotilla in international waters off Cyprus, further enforcing its blockade on Gaza. ([aljazeera.com](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/18/israeli-forces-intercept-gaza-bound-aid-flotilla?utm_source=openai))
